sections.paragraph: c. (m. 1Sa 6:8. 1Sa 4:17 2Ch 8:11), an ark, chest, into which things are collected to be kept, from the root אָרָה No. 3, to collect. (Arab. إِرَانُ and أَرَانُ a wooden chest, especially a coffin.) Used of a money chest, 2Ki 12:10, 11 2Ki 12:11of a coffin, Gen 50:26 but most frequently of the holy ark in which the two tables of the law were kept; called more fully אֲרֹון הָעֵדוּת “the ark of the testimony,” Exo 25:22 26:33 אֲרֹון בְּרִית יְהֹוָה, Deu 10:8 31:9 , 25 Deu 31:25 אֲרֹון הַבְּרִית Jos 3:6 4:9 אֲרֹון יְהֹוָה, 1Sa 5:3, 1Sa 5:4 6:8 , seq.
